evidence: VC "David Blaine" Strategy: Using FOMO and Letter of Intents (LOIs) from high-tier partners (like Sapphire) to position the technology as a critical asset for VC portfolio companies in "talent wars."
Vrijen plans to treat upcoming tranches as loans rather than equity to ensure his father (the primary funder) is paid out first upon any liquidity event.

43North is an accelerator + VC fund that paradoxically operates as a non-profit backed by the State of New York. Their core mandate is job creation and economic development, especially focused on reshaping downtown Buffalo.
Nick jokes that maybe it’s a nod to Stranger Things coming back and the entertainment landscape feeling a bit dry after video-call chaos.
Vrijen confirmed that certain investments will be recorded as non-interest-bearing loans from officers (Vrijen/Logan) to the company.
Zeni provides bookkeeping but not formal audits (which require a CPA signature).
